subcodes.first_line: That which lay hidden in the treasury of knowledge hath been made manifest, and that which was concealed in the repositories of wisdom hath been sent down [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر ما هو المستور فی کنز العلم و نزل ما کان مکنونا فی خزآئن العرفان قد
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @goodly deeds; actions, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @living waters; water of life, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God
